task: Erdos686 k=5 N=4: third row + tight-window pinning + convergent reduction

constants.dA_window: A <= c*d <= A+4 (exactly 4 integer candidates per d)

third_row.congruence: A+j-1 | T_j(72d-23A) - 72^5*R_j(d) as identity in ZZ[d,A]

tight_scan.validation: bit-identical vs exact Python brute force for d < 300000
tight_scan.banked_branch_statement: no (d,A) with d >= 125, A <= c*d <= A+4, A|R1(d), A+1|R2(d) for d < 1e11

cone_scan.conclusion: cone two-row solutions persist at all scales; three-row has none for t in [95,1e6)

convergent_reduction.pinning: |4^(1/5) - X/Y| < 0.61/Y^2 for Y >= 40 (exact-verified for Y in [40,20000] + leading-term margin)
convergent_reduction.family: Y in {g*q_k} union mediants of cf(4^(1/5)), g^2 <= a_{k+1}+2
convergent_reduction.verified_bound: no solution with n+3 <= 1e120 (d <= 3.19e119), conditional on Legendre/Fatou step
convergent_reduction.unconditional_cross_check: no solution with n+3 <= 2e6 (brute, all Y with ||qY|| < 0.9/Y)

lean_ready.window_pin_demo: compute/theory/K5WindowPin.lean (compiles clean via lake env lean)
banking_order: Lemma B window pinning + bracket constants
third-row t-product machinery + extended escape theorem
convergent reduction: centering + Step-1 inequality + Legendre/Fatou + CF certificate
